meaningJa: 本当にそう、同意
exampleJa: 「月曜だるい」「それな」
exampleEn: "Mondays suck." "So true."
socialConsequenceEn: Bang-current casual agreement. Use it and you sound like a real young local.

tag.sourceNote: 「それなんだよ」短縮。定番の同意

meaningJa: とりあえず、まあ
exampleJa: とりま集合な。
exampleEn: Anyway, let's meet up.
socialConsequenceEn: Casual and current among young people. Slightly too casual for work.

meaningEn: The deep feeling of 'I totally get it'
meaningJa: 共感できる気持ち(「分かる」の名詞化)
exampleJa: その悩み、わかりみが深い。
exampleEn: That struggle? I feel it deeply.
socialConsequenceEn: Young and online-flavored. Fun with friends, a bit much in formal talk.

meaningJa: 写真映えする、見栄えが良い
exampleJa: このカフェ映えるね。
exampleEn: This cafe is so Insta-worthy.
socialConsequenceEn: Fully mainstream (from インスタ映え). Safe and current.

tag.sourceNote: インスタ映え→映え。2017流行語

meaningEn: Aww, I could cry (a small sad/pleading whimper)
meaningJa: ちょっと泣きそう・残念な気持ち
exampleJa: 売り切れてた、ぴえん。
exampleEn: It was sold out, aww.
socialConsequenceEn: Peaked around 2020 — now a bit dated/Gen-Z-cringe. Use ironically.

tag.sourceNote: 泣き顔の擬態。2020流行、現在やや下火

meaningJa: 本気で、本当に
exampleJa: それガチで美味い。
exampleEn: That's legit delicious.
socialConsequenceEn: Everywhere and totally safe. A reliable intensifier.

tag.sourceNote: 「ガチンコ」由来。本気の意の定番強調

meaningJa: なるべく早く
exampleJa: それなるはやで頼む。
exampleEn: Get that done ASAP.
socialConsequenceEn: Casual young/work slang. A bit informal for bosses.

meaningJa: ちなみに
exampleJa: ちな、明日休みね。
exampleEn: Btw, day off tomorrow.
socialConsequenceEn: Texting slang. Casual and young.

meaningEn: Food porn — posting tempting food late
meaningJa: 空腹時に飯の画像で攻撃すること
exampleJa: 夜中の飯テロやめて。
exampleEn: Stop with the midnight food porn.
socialConsequenceEn: Mainstream & funny. Totally safe.

meaningJa: 気まずい
exampleJa: 目が合ってきまず。
exampleEn: Made eye contact — so awkward.
socialConsequenceEn: Young clipped slang. Casual.

meaningJa: 了解の超略
exampleJa: 「7時集合」「りょ」
exampleEn: "Meet at 7." "k."
socialConsequenceEn: JK texting. Way too casual for work.

meaningEn: A comforting, motherly vibe (you feel babied)
meaningJa: 母性に甘えたくなる雰囲気
exampleJa: あの先輩バブみある。
exampleEn: That senpai has serious motherly vibes.
socialConsequenceEn: Niche otaku-adjacent slang. Insider-ish.

meaningEn: Going cold once your crush likes you back
meaningJa: 好きだった相手に好かれた途端冷める現象
exampleJa: 両思いになった瞬間蛙化現象きた
exampleRomaji: ryouomoi ni natta shunkan kaeruka-genshou kita
exampleEn: The second it was mutual, I went cold.
socialConsequenceEn: A massive 2023 buzzword. Reads very current and very online.

meaningJa: どんな親に生まれるかは運次第という考え
exampleJa: 親ガチャ当たりだったわ
exampleEn: I won the parent lottery, honestly.
socialConsequenceEn: A loaded 2021 term about inherited circumstance. Touches a nerve.

meaningJa: 時間対効果。タイムパフォーマンス
exampleJa: 倍速視聴はタイパ重視だから
exampleRomaji: baisoku shichou wa taipa juushi dakara
exampleEn: I watch at 2x for time efficiency.
socialConsequenceEn: The 2022 sequel to 'kosupa'. Defines a whole generation's habits.

meaningJa: 費用対効果。コストパフォーマンス
exampleJa: この店コスパ良すぎ
exampleEn: This place is amazing value.
socialConsequenceEn: Totally standard now. The yardstick for any purchase.

meaningJa: 内向的で地味な性格の人
exampleJa: 休み時間は陰キャムーブしてた
exampleRomaji: yasumi jikan wa in-kya muubu shiteta
exampleEn: At break I went full introvert-mode.
socialConsequenceEn: Self-applied or teasing. Pairs with 'you-kya'.

meaningJa: 明るく社交的な人
exampleJa: 陽キャは輪の中心にいる
exampleRomaji: you-kya wa wa no chuushin ni iru
exampleEn: The extroverts are always center-stage.
socialConsequenceEn: The sunny counterpart to in-kya. Half envy, half label.

meaningJa: コミュニケーションが苦手なこと
exampleJa: 電話とか無理、コミュ障だもん
exampleRomaji: denwa toka muri, komyushou da mon
exampleEn: Phone calls? No way, I'm bad with people.
socialConsequenceEn: Casual self-deprecation, not a clinical claim. Very common.

meaningJa: 一人ぼっちの略
exampleJa: 昼休みぼっち飯だった
exampleEn: I ate lunch all alone.
socialConsequenceEn: From 'hitori-bocchi'. Now half-affectionate ('bocchi-meshi').

meaningJa: ゆったりくつろぐこと
exampleJa: 今日は家でチルする
exampleRomaji: kyou wa ie de chiru suru
exampleEn: I'm just gonna chill at home today.
socialConsequenceEn: From English 'chill'. 'Chill-i' (chirui) = the adjective.

meaningEn: To hit sauna bliss (sauna + cold plunge high)
meaningJa: サウナで心身が整う快感
exampleJa: 水風呂のあとととのった
exampleEn: After the cold bath I reached sauna nirvana.
socialConsequenceEn: From the 2020s sauna boom. A specific, blissful trance.

meaningJa: 優位に立とうとする言動
exampleJa: さらっとマウント取ってくる
exampleEn: They casually one-up you.
socialConsequenceEn: 'Maunto o toru' = to subtly assert superiority. Very current.

meaningJa: クリア不可能なほど難しい状況
exampleJa: この納期、無理ゲーだろ
exampleEn: This deadline is literally impossible.
socialConsequenceEn: Gaming metaphor for real life. Widely understood.

meaningJa: もう打つ手がない、終わった
exampleJa: 財布忘れた、詰んだ
exampleEn: Forgot my wallet — I'm done for.
socialConsequenceEn: From chess/shogi 'checkmate'. The gen-Z 'I'm finished'.

meaningJa: 胸がきゅんとする、の決め台詞
exampleJa: その仕草きゅんです
exampleEn: That little gesture made my heart flutter.
socialConsequenceEn: A 2020 TikTok craze with a hand-heart pose. Peak cute.

meaningJa: 言い切った後に責任回避でつける語
exampleJa: たぶん晴れる、知らんけど
exampleEn: It'll probably clear up, but idk.
socialConsequenceEn: Kansai-origin tic that went national. A perfect disclaimer.

meaningEn: Well, that's just true; fair point
meaningJa: 確かにその通り、と認める語
exampleJa: 早く寝た方がいい？それはそう
exampleRomaji: hayaku neta hou ga ii? sore wa sou
exampleEn: Sleep earlier? …Yeah, fair.
socialConsequenceEn: A dry, agreeable shrug. Very online conversational rhythm.

meaningJa: マジで？の超省略
exampleJa: 明日休講だって。ま？
exampleEn: Class is cancelled tomorrow. For real?
socialConsequenceEn: One syllable of disbelief. Texting-native.

meaningJa: つらい気持ち（〜み表現）
exampleJa: 月曜の朝はつらみが深い
exampleRomaji: getsuyou no asa wa tsurami ga fukai
exampleEn: Monday mornings hit with deep pain.
socialConsequenceEn: The '-mi' suffix that turns feelings into nouns (cf. wakarimi).

meaningJa: うれしい気持ち（〜み表現）
exampleJa: 推しが配信、うれしみ
exampleEn: My fave is streaming — pure joy.
socialConsequenceEn: Cute '-mi' coinage. Soft, fan-flavored happiness.

meaningJa: 病みかわ系のファッション・性格
exampleJa: 地雷系メイク似合うね
exampleEn: The landmine-style makeup suits you.
socialConsequenceEn: Black-and-pink, frilly-but-volatile aesthetic. A whole 2020s subculture.

meaningJa: 似たような無難で可愛い系の見た目
exampleJa: 今日は量産型コーデ
exampleEn: Today's a mass-produced-cutie outfit.
socialConsequenceEn: Pastel, frilly, identical-by-design. Half-pride, half-tease.

meaningEn: Beyond crying (even more emotional than pien)
meaningJa: ぴえんを超えた強い感情表現
exampleJa: 尊すぎてぴえん超えてぱおん
exampleEn: So precious I'm beyond tears.
socialConsequenceEn: The escalated form of pien. Peak 2020 gal-emoji energy.

meaningJa: 気色悪い、の若者表現
exampleJa: その絡み方きしょい
exampleEn: The way they're being is so creepy.
socialConsequenceEn: From 'kishoku warui'. Harsher than kimoi — careful who hears.

meaningJa: 構ってちゃんの略
exampleJa: 深夜のかまちょツイート
exampleEn: A late-night attention-seeking post.
socialConsequenceEn: From 'kamatte-chan'. Gently mocks needy posting.

meaningJa: 風呂に入るので離脱、の略
exampleJa: ちょっとフロリダするね
exampleEn: Brb, hopping in the bath.
socialConsequenceEn: Pun on 'furo ridatsu' (=Florida). Cheeky chat shorthand.

meaningJa: 本気で取り組む人たち
exampleJa: あの界隈ガチ勢ばっか
exampleEn: That scene is all hardcore types.
socialConsequenceEn: From gachi + zei (crowd). Opposite of 'enjoy-zei' (casuals).

reading: じょうちょふあんてい
meaningJa: 感情の起伏が激しいこと
exampleJa: 推しのせいで情緒不安定
exampleEn: My fave's got me on an emotional rollercoaster.
socialConsequenceEn: Used jokingly for fan/feels overload, not clinically.

meaningJa: やばいをかわいく言った形
exampleJa: 寝坊した、やばたん
exampleEn: I overslept, yikes!
socialConsequenceEn: Cutesy 'yabai'. Also stretched to 'yabatanien'. Very gal-reiwa.

meaningJa: まさにそれな、と共感する事柄
exampleJa: 月曜だるいはそれな案件
exampleEn: 'Mondays are rough' is a total mood.
socialConsequenceEn: Stacks 'sore na' + '-anken' (a case/matter). Very online.

meaningJa: 推し活に疲れてしまうこと
exampleJa: 課金しすぎて推し疲れ
exampleEn: I spent too much and burned out as a fan.
socialConsequenceEn: The honest downside of fandom intensity. Increasingly discussed.

meaningEn: Going cold on a crush (clipped form)
meaningJa: 蛙化現象の略
exampleJa: ちょっとした仕草で蛙化した
exampleRomaji: chotto shita shigusa de kaeruka shita
exampleEn: One small gesture and I went cold.
socialConsequenceEn: The everyday clipped form of kaeruka-genshou.

meaningJa: 感情が限界、もう無理（良い意味も）
exampleJa: かわいすぎて限界
exampleEn: Too cute — I've hit my limit.
socialConsequenceEn: Short for the 'genkai' emotional state. Often joy-overload.

meaningJa: 中年男性特有の砕けすぎたメッセージ文体
exampleJa: 絵文字多すぎておじ構文
exampleEn: Too many emojis — total uncle-text.
socialConsequenceEn: Mocks the over-familiar, emoji-stuffed texts of older men.

meaningEn: A 'dopamine kid' — can't focus, needs constant stimulation
meaningJa: 強い刺激に慣れて集中が続かない若年層の自虐語
exampleJa: もうドパガキで10分も集中できない
exampleRomaji: mou dopagaki de juppun mo shuuchuu dekinai
exampleEn: I'm such a dopamine-kid, can't focus 10 minutes.
socialConsequenceEn: From 'dopamine + gaki (kid)'. Z/α-gen self-roast for short-video brain (late 2024).

tag.sourceNote: ドーパミン中毒のガキ; 2024末 Z/α世代の自虐語 (Wikipedia/集英社オンライン)

meaningEn: Smitten; so charming it melts your heart
meaningJa: メロメロになるほど魅力的
exampleJa: 推しの笑顔がメロい
exampleEn: My fave's smile makes me melt.
socialConsequenceEn: Adjective form of 'meromero'. Peak oshi-katsu and crush vocab (2025).

meaningEn: I love it/them so much I'm destroyed
meaningJa: 好きすぎて滅びそうなほど、の強い推し表現
exampleJa: この曲好きすぎて滅
exampleEn: I love this song so much I'm dead.
socialConsequenceEn: 'Metsu' (annihilation) as hyperbole. The stan's 'I'm deceased' (2025).

tag.sourceNote: 激推し表現 好きすぎて滅; 2025 (weknowledge)

meaningJa: ビジュアル、見た目
exampleJa: 今日ビジュ良すぎ
exampleEn: Your look today is too good.
socialConsequenceEn: Clipped 'visual'. 'Biju ii jan' was a 2025 hit phrase/song.

tag.sourceNote: ビジュ=ビジュアル; ビジュいいじゃん 2025 (haradaeigo/g-crews)

meaningEn: At full capacity; overwhelmed; maxed out
meaningJa: 容量がいっぱいで余裕がない
exampleJa: レポート4本同時はキャパい
exampleEn: Four reports at once — I'm maxed out.
socialConsequenceEn: Adjective from 'capacity'. The gen-Z 'I can't even' (2025).

meaningJa: 尊いを崩したかわいい言い方
exampleJa: あの二人のやりとりてぇてぇ
exampleEn: Those two interacting are so precious.
socialConsequenceEn: Baby-talk 'toutoi', from VTuber clips. Wholesome fan flail (2025).

meaningJa: おいしいことが確定している
exampleJa: このチーズバーガー、ウマ確
exampleEn: This cheeseburger? Guaranteed delicious.
socialConsequenceEn: 'Umai' + 'kakutei' (confirmed). The foodie stamp of approval (2025).

meaningJa: 入浴をやめてしまうこと
exampleJa: 疲れて今日も風呂キャンしちゃった
exampleEn: Too tired — skipped my bath again today.
socialConsequenceEn: 'Furo' + 'cancel'. A whole '風呂キャン界隈' formed around it (2025).

tag.sourceNote: 風呂+キャンセル; 風呂キャン界隈 2025 (haradaeigo)

meaningJa: 見た目が最高潮にいい状態
exampleJa: 今日の推しビジュ爆発してる
exampleEn: My fave's looks are exploding today.
socialConsequenceEn: When someone's 'biju' is off the charts. Pure hype compliment (2025).

meaningEn: Cutely/earnestly trotting off to share news (meme)
meaningJa: メンフクロウの雛画像発の構文。一生懸命伝える様子
exampleJa: エッホエッホ、みんなに伝えなきゃ
exampleEn: Trot trot — gotta go tell everyone!
socialConsequenceEn: From a baby barn-owl photo. A cutesy 'I must share this!' template (2025).

tag.sourceNote: メンフクロウ雛発の構文; 2025上半期1位級 (haradaeigo/g-crews); 用法ニュアンス要確認

meaningJa: 本当に、を money でもじった強調表現
exampleJa: 推しからリプ来た、ほんmoney
exampleEn: My fave replied — for real!!
socialConsequenceEn: Pun on 'honma ni' (really). Playful emphasis/gratitude (2025).

tag.sourceNote: ほんまに+money のダジャレ; 2025 (g-crews/haradaeigo); ニュアンス要確認
